title: Soundtrack+
description: Adds some unused C418 songs & backports 1.21+ songs back to 1.20
body:
This Resource Pack adds some of the unused Volume Alpha & Beta tracks from C418 and backports all the 1.21+ soundtrack. 

Unused songs not fitting as background music were still not added.
This Resource Pack was made for the [Brassworks SMP](https://discord.gg/nDhkgzAPR2) modpack were said songs are instead added as music discs.

All music included was made by C418, Lena Raine, Kumi Tanioka, Aaron Cherof, and Amos Roddy.
